170b20e1-b35c-41d8-baea-c3d480406bff.label: text_chunk
170b20e1-b35c-41d8-baea-c3d480406bff.text:
KITTY HAVEN SANCTUARY OF UTAH CONFIDENTIALITY AND NON-DISCLOSURE AGREEMENT

This Confidentiality and Non-Disclosure Agreement (this "Agreement") is entered into as of Kitty Haven Sanctuary of Utah, a Utah corporation and IRS 501(c)(3) nonprofit organization (Disc l osing Company) and Volunteer Applicant (Recipient) (each referred to as a "Party" and collectively referred to as the "Parties").

2fdcf6f6-ffbd-4c45-82c9-5cd7a46b02b7.label: text_chunk
2fdcf6f6-ffbd-4c45-82c9-5cd7a46b02b7.text:
In consideration of the premises and covenants herein set forth and other good and valuable consideration, the legal sufficiency of which is hereby acknowledged, the Parties hereby agree as follows:
1. Treatment  of  Confidential  Information.

  The  Confidential  Information  (as  defined  in  Section  2), whether transmitted orally, in writing or in any other form, and whether prepared by a Party or its employees, agents, advisors or  other  representatives,

079e91ab-8978-4908-8d1a-6e7544ac4012.label: text_chunk
079e91ab-8978-4908-8d1a-6e7544ac4012.text: shall  be preserved in  strict  confidence by  the receiving  Party, shall not be disclosed, disseminated or distributed by the receiving Party other than as expressly authorized herein, and shall be used exclusively for the purposes or transactions contemplated by this Agreement.

87616bcf-751f-48cf-b991-13b4a70cbac3.label: text_chunk
87616bcf-751f-48cf-b991-13b4a70cbac3.text:
Disclosure of the  Confidential  Information  may  be  made  only  to  employees,  agents  or  independent  contractors  of  a  Party who are directly involved in consideration of the transaction, which is the subject of this Agreement and who are bound to maintain its confidence.2. Definition of Confidential Information.

 The term "Confidential Information" shall mean for purposes of  this  Agreement,  any  and  all  sensitive  business,

9bbdc944-0ce7-4f28-9d58-a0d9539e9442.label: text_chunk
9bbdc944-0ce7-4f28-9d58-a0d9539e9442.text: financial  and  technical  information  provided  prior  to  the execution of this Agreement and to be provided after the execution of this Agreement by a transmitting Party to the receiving Party, including, without limitation, financial statements, reports and data, customer lists, trade secrets,  technical  data,  proprietary  information,  and  any  other  confidential  information  regarding  the transmitting  Party,  its  subsidiaries  and  its  respective  businesses.

05a9ab37-f666-4d45-a8cf-7814ad270ea4.label: text_chunk
05a9ab37-f666-4d45-a8cf-7814ad270ea4.text: Confidential  Information  does  not  include information, which is shown by clear and convincing evidence to be (i) publicly available without breach by the receiving Party of its obligations to the disclosing Party under this Agreement; (ii) known to the receiving Party  prior  to  the  disclosing Party's  disclosure  of  such  information  to  the  receiving  Party;

97323515-8e78-44ba-a155-23e540077e36.label: text_chunk
97323515-8e78-44ba-a155-23e540077e36.text: (iii)  known  to  the receiving Party other than by the breach of an obligation of confidentiality owed to the disclosing Party under this Agreement from a source other than the disclosing Party; (iv) independently developed by the receiving Party ; (v) disclosed by the disclosing Party to a third party free of any duty of confidentiality on the third party;

f8ec86f8-2364-4450-ac0b-01ace5cb111d.label: text_chunk
f8ec86f8-2364-4450-ac0b-01ace5cb111d.text: ( vi) disclosed under operation of law provided the receiving Party gives the disclosing Party reasonable notice prior  to  such  disclosure  and  cooperates  with  the  disclosing  Party  in  its  efforts  to  keep  the  Confidential Information  confidential;

6059fcf1-9c8d-43e7-aa93-35760fc8cde2.label: text_chunk
6059fcf1-9c8d-43e7-aa93-35760fc8cde2.text:
(vii) disclosed by the receiving Party with the prior written approval of the disclosing Party; or (viii) inherently disclosed  in  products  or  services  being  developed  or  marketed  by  the  receiving  Party  prior  to  the  receipt  of pertinent Confidential Information from the disclosing Party .3. Ownership of Confidential Information.

 The disclosing Party shall retain all right , title and interest in and  to  the  Confidential  Information,

61a14ab9-7827-44e8-b7fe-9cfad5cd16b4.label: text_chunk
61a14ab9-7827-44e8-b7fe-9cfad5cd16b4.text: including  all  intellectual  property  represented  thereby    or  associated therew i th,  and  no  license  or  assignment,  by  implication,  estoppel  or  otherwise,  is  granted  by  the  disclosing Party to the receiving Party to make, have made, use, or sell any product using the Confidential Information , or a license under any patent , patent application, utility model, copyright, trade secret, trademark,

add289c4-5880-4f2c-970b-81b7c947feb7.label: text_chunk
add289c4-5880-4f2c-970b-81b7c947feb7.text:
service mark or any  other  similar  industrial  or  intellectual  property  right .

 At  no  time    and  under  no  circumstances  shall  the receiving Party reverse - engineer , decompile or disassemble any part of the Confidential Information .4. Responsibility  for  Breach.

852fd077-69a7-4ba4-8e0c-04e6338ec024.label: text_chunk
852fd077-69a7-4ba4-8e0c-04e6338ec024.text:
Each Party agrees to  be  responsible  for  any  breach  of  this  Agreement  by any third party to whom such Party has provided Confidential Information, or any portion thereof.

 If a Party or any  third  party  to  whom  such  Party  has  provided  Confidential  Information  becomes  legally  compelled  (by oral  question,  deposition,  interrogatory,  request  for  documents,  subpoena,

8d7fa429-d7f8-4246-abb9-3601e7dd31b4.label: text_chunk
8d7fa429-d7f8-4246-abb9-3601e7dd31b4.text:
civil  investigative  demand  or simi l ar  process  or  by  rule,  regulation  or other  applicable  law)  to  disclose  any  Confidential Information, such Party shall promptly notify the other Party of such requirement before any disclosure is made so that the other Party may seek a protective order or other appropriate remedy or may waive compliance with the terms of this Agreement.

 If such protective order or other remedy is not obtained,

c20c15da-04d0-42aa-8868-d97f665f0095.label: text_chunk
c20c15da-04d0-42aa-8868-d97f665f0095.text: or if a Party waives compliance  with  the  provisions  hereof,  each  Party  agrees  that  only  that  portion  of  the  Confidential Information which it is legally required to disclose (as advised by a written opinion of counsel) will be disclosed,  and  each  Party  agrees  to  exercise  its  best  efforts  to  obtain  assurance  that  the  Confidential Information will be treated confidentially upon disclosure.

10ee7d1d-69ba-46cc-9f83-14b9b83391bb.label: text_chunk
10ee7d1d-69ba-46cc-9f83-14b9b83391bb.text:
5. Term. This Agreement will continue in full force and effect until both parties agree in writing to terminate this agreement and for one - year thereafter.

 The Parties agree that if the negotiated transaction does  not  proceed  within  a  reasonable  time,  or  upon  any  request  from  either  Party,

40931c2d-0178-4fa5-adbd-24f0b92ad80c.label: text_chunk
40931c2d-0178-4fa5-adbd-24f0b92ad80c.text: each  Party  shall promptly  deliver  to  the  other  Party  all  written  Confidential  Information  and  any  other  written  material containing  or  reflecting  Confidential  Information  and  will  not  retain  any  copies,  extracts  or  other reproductions  in  whole  or  in  part  of  such  written  material.

2a338ebf-a77e-48e5-9ccc-f9492bd2c2a7.label: text_chunk
2a338ebf-a77e-48e5-9ccc-f9492bd2c2a7.text: All  documents,  memoranda,  notes  and  other writings  whatsoever  prepared  by  each  Party,  or  respective  representatives,  based  on  the  information included  in  the  Confidential  Information  shall  be  promptly  destroyed,  and  such  destruction  shall  be ce1tified in writing by an authorized officer supervising such destruction.

6baa683a-fbe6-4cb4-8a62-5b15bf81a540.label: text_chunk
6baa683a-fbe6-4cb4-8a62-5b15bf81a540.text:
Notwithstanding the return or destruction  of any  Confidential Information,  each  Party  shall  continue to  be  bound  by its  obligations  o f confidentiality and other obligations hereunder.6. Form of Relief.

 The Parties hereby acknowledge and agree that, in the event of any breach of this Agreement by either Party, including, without limitation,

946922ec-bdce-42f7-a052-9fcd8bcecb49.label: text_chunk
946922ec-bdce-42f7-a052-9fcd8bcecb49.text: the actual or threatened disclosure of a Party's Confidential  Information  without  the  express  prior  written  consent  of  that  Paity,  such  Party  will  suffer irreparable  harm  and  injury  and  no  remedy  at  law  will  afford  it  adequate  protection  against,  or appropriate compensation for, such injury .

ddba6c34-f628-46a5-a249-eb2e693521c4.label: text_chunk
ddba6c34-f628-46a5-a249-eb2e693521c4.text: Accordingly, each Party hereby agrees that, in any such event, the harmed Party shall be entitled to seek specific performance of the other Party's obligations under this Agreement , as  well  as  such  further  injunctive  relief  as  may  be  granted  by  a  court  of  competent jurisdiction.7. Confidentiality  of  Discussions.

797531ac-13a9-4335-9070-0eac561472c8.label: text_chunk
797531ac-13a9-4335-9070-0eac561472c8.text: Unless  otherwise  required  by  law,  without  the  prior  written consent of the other Party, neither a Party nor its representatives shall disclose to any person (including any  corporation,  company,  partnership  or  individual)  either  the  fact  that  discussions  or  negotiations  are taking place concerning a possible transaction between the Parties or any of the terms, conditions or other facts with respect to any such possible transaction, including the status thereof.

d86c126d-8bfb-4cf4-9437-90f8574320db.label: text_chunk
d86c126d-8bfb-4cf4-9437-90f8574320db.text: 8. Assignment. This Agreement and the rights and obligations of either Party under this Agreement may be assigned or transferred only upon the prior written approval of the other Party hereto.

5d908931-8731-4e1b-abe1-ef06d55bbb3e.label: text_chunk
5d908931-8731-4e1b-abe1-ef06d55bbb3e.text: The rights and  obligations  of  the  Parties  hereto  will  inure  to  the  benefit  of,  will  be  binding  upon,  and  will  be enforceable by the Parties hereto, their representatives and their permitted successors and  assigns.9. Modifications.

baa3dd1e-30f7-40b4-9442-7a17864970d8.label: text_chunk
baa3dd1e-30f7-40b4-9442-7a17864970d8.text: No modifications of this Agreement or waiver of any of its terms will be effective unless set forth in writing signed by the Party against whom it is sought to be enforced.10. Choice  of  Law.

9c643c7a-5fc1-4568-8e2d-d6d1d530849c.label: text_chunk
9c643c7a-5fc1-4568-8e2d-d6d1d530849c.text: THIS  AGREEMENT  SHALL  BE  GOVERNED  BY  THE  LAWS  OF  THE STATE  OF  UTAH , EXCLUDING  CHOICE  OF  LAW  AND  CONFLICTS  OF  LAW  PRINCIPLES WHICH  DIRECT  THE  APPLICATION  OF  THE  LAWS  OF  A  DIFFERENT  STATE .

00c8eac8-8dd8-444b-9b4f-2fd7526ef8d3.label: text_chunk
00c8eac8-8dd8-444b-9b4f-2fd7526ef8d3.text: The  rule  of construction that contracts are to be construed strictly against the drafter is expressly made inapplicable to this Agreement.11. Severability.

b8dd05cd-b352-44ef-b1f2-e02556b145ba.label: text_chunk
b8dd05cd-b352-44ef-b1f2-e02556b145ba.text: If any provision of this Agreement is held by final judgment of a court of competent jurisdiction to be invalid, illegal or unenforceable, such invalid, illegal or unenforceable provision shall be severed from the remainder of  this  Agreement,  and  the  remainder  of  this  Agreement  shall  be  enforced.

d1f60b17-4409-4e37-81c2-2f58ca997126.label: text_chunk
d1f60b17-4409-4e37-81c2-2f58ca997126.text: In  addition,  the  invalid,  illegal  or unenforceable provision shall  be  deemed to  be automatically modified,  and,  as so  modified,  to  be  included  in  this Agreement, such modification being made to the minimum extent necessary to render the provision valid, legal and enforceable.

f6fb79c0-483e-4232-b27a-e788f4f59bcc.label: text_chunk
f6fb79c0-483e-4232-b27a-e788f4f59bcc.text: Notwithstanding the foregoing, however, if the severed or modified provision concerns all or a portion of the essential consideration to be delivered under this Agreement by one Party to the other, the remaining provisions of this Agreement shall also be modified to the extent necessary to equitably adjust the Parties' respective rights and obligations hereunder.12. Counterparts.

1d85243a-b773-4e58-89de-137b7b9b4e18.label: text_chunk
1d85243a-b773-4e58-89de-137b7b9b4e18.text: This Agreement may be executed in any number of counterparts and any Party hereto may  execute  any  such  counterpart,  each  of  which  when  executed  and  delivered  shall  be  deemed  to  be  an original  and  all  of  which  counterparts  taken  together  shall  constitute  but  one  and  the  same  instrument.

b3453814-516f-49e1-95a7-46ab03f57b38.label: text_chunk
b3453814-516f-49e1-95a7-46ab03f57b38.text:
This Agreement shall become binding when all counterparts taken together shall have been executed and delivered by  the  Parties.  A  telecopied  facsimile  of  an  executed  counterpart  of  this  Agreement  shall  be  sufficient  to
evidence the binding agreement of each Party to the terms hereof.13. RELEASE.

7257b178-fac9-4977-8f8f-a3dae2713b53.label: text_chunk
7257b178-fac9-4977-8f8f-a3dae2713b53.text: As  consideration  for  being  permitted  by  Kitty  Haven  to  participate  in  activities  and provide Services,  I  hereby  agree that  I,  my  assignees,  heirs, distributees,  guardians,  and  legal  representatives will  not  make  a  claim  against,  sue,

227f0ac9-a552-46ef-b11c-28b512847708.label: text_chunk
227f0ac9-a552-46ef-b11c-28b512847708.text: or  attach  the  property  of  Kitty  Haven  Sanctuary  of  Utah  for  injury  or damage resulting from any act, omission, negligence or other acts, howsoever caused, by any employee, agent, contractor, or representative of Kitty Haven as a result of my participation in activities and performance of the Services and any A-V Recordings.

dfc4a0ce-a89d-487f-bce9-bfead94860d5.label: text_chunk
dfc4a0ce-a89d-487f-bce9-bfead94860d5.text:
I hereby release Kitty Haven from all actions, claims, or demands that I, my assignees, heirs, distributees, guardians, and legal representatives now have or may hereafter have for injury or damage resulting from my participation in activities and performance of the Services and any A-V Recordings.____________________________________________________ Signature of Visitor or Volunteer
___________________________ Date

community_summary.0:
**Summary of Relationships Involving Kitty Haven Sanctuary of Utah and Volunteer Applicant**

1. **Entities Involved**: Kitty Haven Sanctuary of Utah and Volunteer Applicant
   - **Relationship**: The Kitty Haven Sanctuary of Utah and the Volunteer Applicant are entering into a Confidentiality and Non-Disclosure Agreement. This agreement establishes the terms of confidentiality and outlines the responsibilities of the Volunteer Applicant regarding sensitive information.

2. **Key Provisions of the Agreement**:
   - **Financial Information**: The agreement includes provisions for the transmission of financial information between the parties, ensuring that sensitive financial data is handled appropriately.
   - **Governance of Relationship**: The agreement serves as a governing document that defines the rights and obligations of both parties involved in the transaction.
   - **Exclusion of Rule of Construction**: It explicitly states that the rule of construction, which typically construes contracts against the drafter, does not apply to this agreement.
   - **Enforceability**: The agreement is subject to judicial review, meaning a court will determine the validity and enforceability of its provisions.
   - **Binding Nature**: The agreement becomes binding once all counterparts have been executed and delivered by the parties, indicating mutual commitment to the terms outlined.

3. **Overall Significance**: This agreement is crucial for establishing a clear framework for confidentiality and the handling of sensitive information, thereby protecting both the Kitty Haven Sanctuary and the Volunteer Applicant in their collaborative efforts.
community_summary.1:
The relationships outlined involve the entities "Parties," "Representatives," and "Successors," highlighting their interconnected legal roles and responsibilities.

1. **Parties and Representatives**: The Parties authorize Representatives to act on their behalf in legal matters. This establishes a direct legal relationship where Representatives are empowered to represent the interests of the Parties.

2. **Parties and Successors**: Successors inherit the rights and obligations of the Parties. This indicates a legal relationship where the responsibilities and entitlements of the original Parties are transferred to their Successors, ensuring continuity of legal obligations.

In summary, the Parties engage Representatives for legal representation and pass on their rights and obligations to Successors, illustrating a structured legal framework that governs the delegation of authority and the inheritance of responsibilities.
community_summary.2:
The relationships outlined in the knowledge graph primarily revolve around the interactions and obligations of a Party in the context of Transactions and Confidential Information. Here’s a summary of the key entities and their relationships:

1. **Party and Transaction**: A Party is actively involved in discussions or negotiations regarding a Transaction, establishing a direct relationship focused on legal agreements.

2. **Party and Confidential Information**: 
   - A Party has access to Confidential Information, contingent upon their involvement in the Transaction and their commitment to confidentiality.
   - The Party is responsible for handling and protecting this Confidential Information, ensuring its security as part of their obligations.
   - Each Party must deliver all written Confidential Information to the other, indicating a mutual obligation to share sensitive data.
   - If required by law or legal processes, the Party must disclose Confidential Information, highlighting their legal responsibilities.

3. **Party and Third Party**: A Party may involve a third party by sharing Confidential Information, creating a connection through the exchange of sensitive data.

4. **Mutual Obligations**: Each Party is bound by the confidentiality obligations and responsibilities outlined in their Agreement, indicating a mutual relationship that governs their interactions.

5. **Legal Rights**: The harmed Party has the right to seek relief from the court, establishing a legal relationship where the court can provide remedies based on the obligations defined in the Agreement.

Overall, these relationships emphasize the critical nature of confidentiality, mutual obligations, and legal rights in the context of Transactions involving sensitive information.

1. **Confidentiality Obligation**: The Receiving Party is required to maintain the confidentiality of information received from the Disclosing Party, as specified in their agreement. This obligation underscores the trust and legal responsibility established between the two parties.

2. **Protection of Service Mark**: The Receiving Party is also tasked with protecting the Service Mark, which is considered confidential information. This responsibility includes ensuring that the Service Mark is not reverse-engineered or disclosed, highlighting the importance of safeguarding intellectual property.

In summary, the Receiving Party has dual responsibilities: to uphold confidentiality regarding the information from the Disclosing Party and to protect the integrity of the Service Mark associated with that information. These relationships emphasize the critical nature of confidentiality and protection in business agreements.

The relationships outlined involve three key entities: the transmitting Party, the disclosing Party, and the receiving Party. 

1. **Transmitting Party to Receiving Party**: The transmitting Party is responsible for providing financial and technical information to the receiving Party as part of an agreement. This relationship emphasizes the exchange of critical information necessary for the receiving Party's operations or decision-making.

2. **Disclosing Party to Receiving Party**: The disclosing Party shares confidential information with the receiving Party, which establishes a relationship of trust and imposes obligations on the receiving Party regarding the handling of that information. This relationship highlights the importance of confidentiality and trust in the exchange of sensitive data.

Overall, these relationships illustrate the dynamics of information sharing, where both the transmitting and disclosing Parties play crucial roles in providing essential information to the receiving Party, while also ensuring that confidentiality and trust are maintained.

The relationships outlined involve the Disclosing Party, the Receiving Party, and Critical Energy Infrastructure Information (CEII). 

1. **Disclosing Party and CEII**: The Disclosing Party is responsible for providing CEII to the Receiving Party. This establishes a relationship characterized by the Disclosing Party's control over the sensitive information, ensuring that it is disseminated appropriately.

2. **Disclosing Party and Receiving Party**: The Disclosing Party shares information directly with the Receiving Party. This indicates a straightforward relationship where the Disclosing Party actively furnishes information, reinforcing the notion of control and responsibility in the information-sharing process.

Overall, the relationships emphasize the Disclosing Party's role as the provider and controller of sensitive information (CEII), while the Receiving Party is positioned as the recipient of this information.

1. **Receiving Parhall and CEII**: The Receiving Parhall is responsible for disclosing CEII, indicating a direct management role in the release of this confidential information. This relationship emphasizes the organization's authority and responsibility in handling sensitive data.

2. **Receiving Parhall and Third Party**: The Receiving Parhall must obtain consent before disclosing information to a third party. This establishes a critical relationship based on the necessity of permission for information sharing, highlighting the importance of privacy and regulatory compliance in the management of confidential information.

Overall, the summary of these relationships underscores the Receiving Parhall's dual role in both managing the disclosure of sensitive information and ensuring that proper consent is obtained before sharing it with external entities.
